title: Assistant Manager/Senior Business Development
description:
Job Responsibilities

·       Lead and drive new business development in the Singapore market

·       Identify, pursue, and close high-value opportunities across Semicon, Medical, Aerospace, Energy, and CNC machining industries

·       Develop sales strategies, market entry plans, investment plans, and business proposals to grow revenue and market share

·       Prepare investment proposals supported by market analysis, customer demand, and commercial justification

·       Conduct market and industry analysis and translate insights into clear business plans and execution actions

·       Achieve revenue targets and strategic KPIs

·       Build and manage strong relationships with customers and stakeholders

·       Collaborate closely with internal teams to execute growth and investment initiatives

·       Attend industry and networking events to expand market presence

·       Track pipeline, forecasts, and performance, and present structured reports to management

·       Ensure accurate and timely CRM updates for all leads, opportunities, and quotations

·       Communicate clearly and professionally to align teams, drive decisions, and deliver results

Job Requirements

·       Diploma / Degree in Engineering or related discipline (or equivalent)

·       Proven B2B business development experience in Semicon, Medical, Aerospace, Energy, or CNC machining industries

·       Polymer and semiconductor process knowledge is a strong advantage

·       Strong hunter mindset with experience in closing new business

·       Highly motivated, self-driven, and results-oriented

·       Excellent interpersonal, communication, and presentation skills

·       Strong teamwork and stakeholder-management capabilities

·       Strategic thinker with hands-on execution ability

Benefits & Rewards

·       Competitive basic salary + attractive commission / incentive plan

·       Clear targets with transparent performance-based rewards

·       Exposure to strategic planning and investment decision-making

·       Opportunities for regional projects and leadership development

postedCompany.description:
Ensinger is a world leader in the field of engineering plastics, excelling in both the manufacture of semi-finished stock shapes and profiles and in the machining of plastic materials. Ensinger located in Singapore, is the South East Asian headquarters of parent company, Ensinger GmbH, based in Nufringen in Germany.

Since its establishment in November 1998 as a branch office of Ensinger GmbH, and then elevated to a full subsidiary as Ensinger Asia Holding in 2014, the journey has been one of continuous growth. Rapidly increasing demand has since led to the development of further branches and sales activities at strategic locations within the SEA region. One fundamental reason for the continuous growth of the company is a proven track record of high quality service and supply to the Asian plastic market. From a large warehousing and cutting facility based in Singapore, and with a global stock portfolio immediately available, Ensinger Asia holding consistently and reliably supplies the engineering plastics requirements of not only Singapore, but including Malaysia, Thailand, Indonesia, Philippines, Vietnam, Australia and New Zealand.
postedCompany.name: ENSINGER ASIA HOLDING PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D23 Hillview, Dairy Farm, Bukit Panjang, Choa Chu Kang
